title: helicteres hirsuta var. viscida
intro: Helicteres hirsuta var. viscida, also known as the hairy helicteres or viscous helicteres, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Helicteres hirsuta var. viscida include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
